text: The familiarization checklist should be completed when the crew member joins the vessel

options.text: Prior to commencement of their duties on joining the ship
Within one month of joining the ship
Within one week of joining the ship
Within two months of joining the ship

explanation: The familiarization checklist, as required by STCW, must be completed before a crew member commences their duties on joining the vessel to ensure they are acquainted with safety procedures and their new environment.
